    Overview of The Coast Bangkok in Bang Na, Bangkok

    The Coast Bangkok is a condo and apartment project located in Bang Na, Bangkok and was completed in Dec 2011. It has 820 units across 39 floors and was developed by Bkk Grand Estate.Co., Ltd.

    About The Coast Bangkok

    Redefining your daily life at The Coast Bangkok, a meticulously designed condominium project covering over 13,800 square meters with a large modern community mall, which is equipped with many famous shops and restaurants, where you can enjoy of convenience within reach when you step out from your room. The common area also has been meticulously designed to perfectly balance the urban lifestyle and nature from the lush greenery. In addition, The Coast Bangkok provides a variety of room sizes ranging from 1 to 3 bedrooms, including duplex rooms that come fully furnished, fulfilling all your needs perfectly.

    Furthermore, The Coast Bangkok is situated in a visually appealing location at Bang Na Intersection, which can connect you to Sukhumvit Road, the eastern coastal route, allowing easy access to neighboring provinces, including easy access to the city with the Chalerm Mahanakorn Expressway and the skywalk from the Community Mall that will lead you to Bang Na BTS. The project is also surrounded by various amenities, such as Bang Nam Phueng Floating Market, Central Bangna, Big C Bangna, Bangkok International Trade and Exhibition Centre (BITEC), Berkeley International School, Bangkok Patana School, Manarom Hospital, Bangna1-Hospital, etc.

    Project Information
    The Coast Bangkok is a high-rise condominium project with 2 buildings (Tower A - 39 story and Tower B - 35 story), totaling 820 residential units, and parking spaces approximately 50% of the total number of units on an 8-rai plot of land. The project is located on Sukhumvit Road, Bang Na, Bang Na, Bangkok, developed by Bkk Grand Estate.Co., Ltd and was completed in 2011.

    Room Types and Details
    - 1 Bedroom (30.24 - 50.83 sq.m.)
    - 2 Bedrooms (51.70 - 64.85 sq.m.)
    - 3 Bedrooms (85 - 89 sq.m.)
    - Duplex (138.74 sq.m.)

    Project Facilities
    - 24-hour security system
    - Car parking
    - CCTV
    - Key-card access
    - Elevator
    - Indoor and Outdoor communal saltwater pools
    - Communal gym
    - Multipurpose library
    - Garden (located on every 3 floors and on the rooftop)
    - On-site shop
    - On-site restaurant
    - Playground
    - WiFi

    Direction to the Project
    - To get to the project by public transport, you can take the BTS Skytrain. The nearest station is Bang Na BTS. Once you get off the station, you can use the skywalk to continue walking to the project. It is approximately 270 meters away, and you will find the community mall of the project on your left-hand side and the walkway leading you to the project.
    - To get to the project by car, you can start from True Digital Park by heading south on Sukhumvit Road (Route 3) for about 2.2 kilometers. Then, make a U-turn and go straight for 550 meters; you will find the project on your left-hand side.

    Parking & Lift

    Ratio of Parking Spaces to # of Units : 25%
    Parking Type : Conventional
    Charging Stations on Site : No
    # of passenger lifts in each building : 3
    # of service lift in each building : 1

    Management

    Common Area Management Fee :
    The common area maintenance (CAM) fee has to be paid monthly by owners for the upkeep of the common areas of condominium and housing projects. For new build projects, it is common to pay between 1 - 3 years’ management fees in advance upon the transfer of the unit’s ownership.
    ฿35/SqM
    Sinking Fund :
    For new projects, the buyer pays a one-off lump sum upon transfer of the property from the developer to the buyer. This fund is to be used for major renovations and replacement of equipment when necessary, to ensure the maintenance of the building and the common area. At The Coast Bangkok the required payment for the sinking fund is ฿350 per square meter based on the size of the indoor area of the property.
    ฿350/SqM
    Common Area Management Company : Self-Managed
    Pets : Not Allowed

    Frequently Asked Questions

    No pets are allowed at The Coast Bangkok unless specifically permitted by the juristic office. Exceptions can be made for service or guide dogs for persons with disabilities.
    The common area maintenance fee at The Coast Bangkok is ฿35 per square meter based on the size of the indoor area of the property. This fee has to be paid every month by owners for the upkeep of the common areas of the project. For new residential developments, it is common to pay up to 1-3 years’ common area maintenance fees in advance upon the transfer of the properties' ownership.
    For new projects, the buyer pays a one-off lump sum upon transfer of the property from the developer to the buyer. This fund is to be used for major renovations and replacement of equipment when necessary, to ensure the maintenance of the building and the common area. At The Coast Bangkok the required payment for the sinking fund is ฿350 per square meter based on the size of the indoor area of the property.
    Bang Na BTS is the nearest BTS Station from The Coast Bangkok and it is 0.4 km away.

    Foreigners can own a condominium Freehold in their own name. Condominium ownership is best explained by looking at an example of a project that has 100 units for sale.

    In this example, 49 of the total units in this building (or 49% of the total salable area) can be owned outright by non-thai nationals in their name.  The ownership titles of these 49 units is referred to as Freehold or Foreign Quota. 

    This leaves 51 units remaining in the building (or 51% of the total salable). The freehold rights to these units are reserved for Thai nationals in what is commonly referred to as the Thai quota.

    After you have found the right property at The Coast Bangkok you have to follow these steps:

    • - Agreement of terms and conditions
    • - Reservation Agreement
    • - Reservation Deposit
    • - Sales and Purchase Agreement
    • - Settlement & Transfer


    Thailand has different visas like Spousal Visa, Retirement Visa, Student Visa and Elite Visa - just to name a few options. Each visa has different requirements but they are usually easy to obtain.

    Great Property
    Verified User, 1 year ago
    Excellent management, amenities, location and aexperience. Excellent management, amenities, location and aexperience.
    Luxury condo with a community mall in Bang Na area
    Shubham Purati, India, 10 years ago
    This condo looks so modern and has a unique design. It also has a community mall, where we can easily go for food there. However, If you want to go shopping, there are also large shopping malls nearby, such as BITEC Bang Na and Central Bangna. It's fantastic that there'...s a walkway leading to Bang Na BTS station. Moreover, my room is very spacious and very comfortable even though it has only one bedroom. Just one thing, I am very disappointed with the project's facilities. It should have more variety for the residents, or perhaps they might think that there is a community mall inside the project, which does not have enough area to place more facilities. Show More
    Bangkok
